## Summary

Describe the problem this pull request solves and why it should land now.

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation-only change
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring with no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, dependency, or tooling changes
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `security` — Security fix or hardening

## Scope

- Included changes:
- Intentionally excluded changes:

## Validation

- [ ] Targeted tests or checks run and passing
- [ ] Backend build succeeds (`dotnet build`)
- [ ] Frontend build succeeds (`yarn build`) — if frontend changes
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior or workflow changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Rollback or mitigation path described

Validation evidence:

```text
paste commands and outcomes here
```

## Risk and rollback

State the main behavioral, migration, or operational risk and the rollback path.

## Production safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or tokens in code or logs
- [ ] No test skips or safety-check bypasses without justification
- [ ] External data validated/sanitized where applicable
- [ ] No known regressions to existing behavior

## Issue linkage

- Fixes #
- Relates to #

## UI evidence

Add screenshots only if the change affects the UI.
